name: trademark-evidence-assistant
description: Trademark Evidence Assistant — npm workspace root

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @trademark-evidence-assistant/server" "npm run dev -w @trademark-evidence-assistant/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @trademark-evidence-assistant/shared && npm run build -w @trademark-evidence-assistant/server && npm run build -w @trademark-evidence-assistant/web
